title: Principal, Early Childhood Center (PreK-K)
notes: Donna Billeaud Early Childhood Center serves PreK-K; campus is named for her. Asst Supt of C&I is Rick Kana (recently moved to Exec Dir of Operations). District offers Tuition Pre-K and state-funded Pre-K. Domain bhisd.net confirmed.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Small Grayson County district. Curriculum and Assessment is run as a district function (sites.google.com/bellsisd.net/curriculumandassessment). Supt Josh Weger (josh.weger@bellsisd.net) and CAO Emily Barnett also handle curriculum questions. Domain bellsisd.net confirmed.

title: Executive Director of Specialized Instruction, Evaluations & Early Childhood
notes: Email inferred from district first.last@birdvilleschools.net pattern (confirmed for Dawn Fielder). Dawn Fielder is Early Childhood Coordinator (dawn.fielder@birdvilleschools.net, 817-547-5680) and is a strong secondary contact. District has full-day PreK and a documented kindergarten readiness initiative (RevPartnership case study).

title: Superintendent
notes: Tiny rural Brown County district (<200 students), one K-12 campus, no dedicated ECE/curriculum staff -- superintendent is the right target. Whisenhunt announced retirement at end of 2025-26 school year (Jan 2026); transition signal. LinkedIn suggests Kevy Allred may be successor.

title: Superintendent
notes: Email inferred from district first.last@blumisd.net pattern; not directly confirmed -- check Apollo.io. Small Hill County district with one PK-12 campus. Elsa Scott (previous supt) retired. No dedicated curriculum director.

title: Superintendent

Asst Supt Lee Ann Farris (leeann.farris@bowieisd.net) resigned Feb 2026 to Region 11. Bowie Elementary Principal Mrs. Wheeler runs ECE at campus.
